collection.name: Gremlin Cartel
collection.description:
Hidden beneath the surface, the Gremlins spent years building their world in silence. Now, the Hideout is open.

Gremlins is a collection of 5,000 handcrafted pixel-art NFTs on Robinhood Chain. Every Gremlin is uniquely assembled with its own personality, traits, and story, forming a community driven by creativity, culture, and curiosity.

More than a collection, Gremlins is the beginning of a recognizable NFT brand built around memorable characters, community-first experiences, and long-term ecosystem growth.

Welcome to the Hideout.

collection.name: PIXEL HOOD CLAN
collection.description:
Pixel Hood Clan by Pixelord is an anonymous collective born on Robin Hood Chain. No names. No leaders. Only unique identities connected by code. Every NFT represents a different member of the Clan, each with their own style, story, and role in building a more open decentralized world.

Pixel Hood Clan was inspired by Pixelord's legendary green-hood avatar—the iconic profile picture he has used continuously since 2021.

collection.name: Hoodini
collection.description:
Hoodini is a curious little mage who wanders the enchanted forests of the Robinhood blockchain. Born in 1169 CE, he lives in a whimsical world inspired by the legends of Robin Hood, where magic, adventure, and mystery are part of everyday life.

Always carrying a spell or two, Hoodini loves practicing new magic, collecting strange artifacts, and helping his friends in the most unexpected ways. With his glowing eyes, oversized hood, and playful spirit, he's always ready for the next magical adventure.

collection.name: GRAVELIN CLUB
collection.description:
GRAVELIN CLUB is a Pharaoh inspired NFT collection that blends ancient Egyptian aesthetics with modern digital art. Each NFT is uniquely designed with carefully crafted traits inspired by the legacy of pharaohs, mythology, temples, and timeless symbolism.

Gravelin Club is more than a collection. It is a community driven project built around creativity, exclusivity, and long term vision, bringing together collectors who appreciate distinctive art and meaningful digital ownership.

collection.name: Robindroids
collection.description: Robindroids is a collection of 2,222 pixel-art robotic NFTs built on the Robinhood ecosystem, designed to bridge digital collectibles with on-chain utility. Each Robindroid serves as a unique identity within the Droid universe, granting holders access to an expanding ecosystem powered by the $DROID memecoin. Through NFT-token integration, holders can utilize their Robindroids to participate in community events, staking and reward mechanisms, gamified quests, governance initiatives, exclusive airdrops, and future ecosystem features tied to $DROID. Rather than existing as static collectibles, Robindroids function as utility-bearing digital assets that strengthen engagement between the NFT collection and the broader Droid economy. As the ecosystem evolves, ownership of a Robindroid unlocks opportunities to earn, participate, and contribute to the growth of the community, creating a sustainable connection between NFT ownership and the long-term success of the $DROID token.

collection.name: The Robin Hood
collection.description:
The Robin Hood is a collection of 3,333 original character NFTs built exclusively for Robinhood Chain. 

Each Robin is a collectible identity and your entry into Sherwood: a growing world of community quests, original stories, and playable experiences. 

Join the flock. Outsmart the Sheriff. Take back the forest.
